data.title: STOCKS | India's NIFTY 50 Index Declines by 1%
data.description: India's NIFTY 50 index experienced a 1% decline, reflecting a downturn in the country's stock market. According to Jin10, this movement comes amid broader market fluctuations and investor concerns. The NIFTY 50, a benchmark index for the Indian equity market, tracks the performance of 50 prominent companies listed on the National Stock Exchange of India. The decline highlights ongoing volatility and uncertainty in the financial markets, prompting investors to closely monitor economic indicators and market trends.

data.title: India Reaffirms Strategic Partnership with Greece, Indian Foreign Ministry Spokesperson Says
data.description: India's Foreign Ministry spokesperson announced that the Secretary of India's External Affairs has reiterated the commitment to the strategic partnership between India and Greece. According to Jin10, the spokesperson emphasized the intention to advance cooperation in various areas of mutual interest. This statement underscores the ongoing diplomatic efforts to strengthen bilateral ties and enhance collaboration across sectors that are significant to both nations.

data.title: Aave Proposes Revenue Allocation to Community DAO Treasury
data.description: Aave has announced its intention to gather feedback on the "Aave Will Win" framework, which aims to allocate 100% of revenue generated from Aave-related services to the community DAO treasury. According to NS3.AI, the funds are intended to support the growth of Aave-related decentralized finance (DeFi) initiatives and the development of its V4 protocol.

data.title: Elon Musk Announces Major Release for Grok Imagine Next Week
data.description: Elon Musk has announced a significant release for Grok Imagine scheduled for next week. According to PANews, Grok Imagine is a video generation tool developed by xAI, centered around the Grok chatbot.

data.title: Philippine Central Bank's Rate Decision Aims to Stabilize Bond Market
data.description: The Philippine central bank's decision to maintain current interest rates is expected to stabilize the government bond market, according to the country's national treasurer. Bloomberg posted on X, the move comes after bond yields surged following the onset of the Iran war. The central bank's stance is seen as a measure to provide stability amid the volatile market conditions.

data.title: STOCKS | Japan's Topix Index Stabilizes After Early Losses
data.description: Japan's Topix index managed to recover from its initial decline, closing the trading session flat. According to Jin10, the index experienced early losses but regained ground as the day progressed. The market's stabilization reflects investor sentiment amid ongoing economic uncertainties. Analysts suggest that the recovery may be attributed to a mix of domestic and international factors influencing market dynamics. The Topix index's performance is closely watched as it provides insights into the broader Japanese stock market trends.

data.title: Polymarket has added a new article titled "When Will the Trump Administration End the Criminal Investigation into Powell?", with a preliminary probability of termination before June at 56%.
data.description: Odaily Seer's monitoring shows that Polymarket has added a new prediction market event: "When will the Trump administration terminate the criminal investigation into Powell?" The probability of termination before April 30th is currently reported at 39%, and the probability of termination before June 30th is currently reported at 56%. This market primarily bases its settlement on official information from the US federal government or widely credible media reports. If the investigation is clearly terminated before the corresponding time and has not entered the stage of indictment or prosecution, it is judged as "yes"; otherwise, it is judged as "no". This investigation stems from Powell's testimony to Congress in June 2025 regarding the renovation of the Federal Reserve headquarters. Current President Trump has previously stated in interviews that there are no immediate plans to advance the investigation and emphasized the independence of the Federal Reserve, adding that his team members also support Powell completing his term. Odaily Seer continues to monitor the prediction market, seeing changes before they are priced in.

data.title: The new address withdrew 340 BTC from Binance, worth approximately $23.14 million.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens, a newly created address withdrew 340 BTC from Binance, worth approximately $23.14 million.

data.title: Vietnamese Airlines to Cut Flights Amid Rising Fuel Costs
data.description: Vietnamese airlines are set to significantly reduce their flight operations starting in April due to escalating fuel prices and supply chain constraints. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting that the ongoing conflict in the Middle East is exacerbating these challenges, leading carriers to concentrate on their core routes. The industry is facing mounting pressure as it navigates these economic hurdles, prompting a strategic shift in operations.

data.title: PRECIOUS METALS | Silver Prices Rise 2% to $69.30 per Ounce
data.description: Silver prices have seen a notable increase, expanding by 2% within the day to reach $69.30 per ounce. According to Jin10, this upward movement in silver prices reflects growing market interest and potential shifts in investor sentiment. The rise comes amid broader discussions on precious metals and their role in current economic conditions. Analysts are closely monitoring these developments as they may indicate future trends in the commodities market.

data.title: Thailand Intensifies Fuel Pricing and Supply Oversight Amid Shortages
data.description: Thailand is increasing its regulatory measures on fuel pricing and supply as part of efforts to tackle shortages affecting various regions. Bloomberg posted on X that the Thai government is implementing stricter controls to ensure stability in fuel availability and pricing. These actions come in response to growing concerns over the impact of fuel shortages on the economy and daily life. Authorities are focusing on maintaining a balanced supply chain and preventing price hikes that could exacerbate the situation. The move is aimed at safeguarding the country's energy security and mitigating potential disruptions in the market.

data.title: Sticker Mule Begins Accepting Cryptocurrency Payments
data.description: Sticker Mule, a U.S.-based custom printing and e-commerce company, has announced the acceptance of cryptocurrency payments. According to Foresight News, this new feature is supported by Stripe, allowing customers to select cryptocurrency as a payment option at checkout. Users can connect their preferred wallets and utilize stablecoins like USDC for transactions. Payments are processed instantly, with no additional fees for either buyers or sellers.

data.title: A spokesperson for the UK Reform Party stated that technologies such as stablecoins can help prevent financial fraud.
data.description: Richard Tice, a spokesperson for the UK's Reform Party, stated that new technologies such as stablecoins and blockchain can help improve the traceability of fund flows, thereby preventing financial fraud to some extent. He pointed out that using technology to track, intercept, or liquidate suspicious fund flows could help improve the efficiency of combating fraud, and emphasized remaining open to such possibilities. (Bloomberg)

data.title: Australia Enhances Oversight of Private Credit Industry
data.description: Australia's corporate regulator is intensifying its oversight of the private credit sector by demanding more comprehensive data from funds on a weekly basis. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the increased scrutiny on the $1.8 trillion industry globally. This move reflects a growing focus on the private credit market, which has seen significant expansion and attention from regulators worldwide. The enhanced supervision aims to ensure transparency and mitigate risks associated with the burgeoning industry.

data.title: OpenAI Expands Codex Capabilities with New Plugin System
data.description: OpenAI has announced a reset of Codex usage limits across all subscription plans, enhancing accessibility for users. According to NS3.AI, the company has also introduced a new plugin system aimed at broadening the application of Codex in daily workflows. The initial set of plugins integrates Codex with popular platforms such as Slack, Figma, Notion, and Gmail, allowing users to streamline their tasks and improve productivity.

data.title: China's LNG Imports Set to Reach Lowest Level Since 2018 Amid Middle East Conflict
data.description: China's liquefied natural gas (LNG) imports are projected to fall to their lowest level since 2018 this month, according to ship-tracking data from Kpler. Bloomberg posted on X that the decline is attributed to a surge in prices driven by the ongoing conflict in the Middle East, which has dampened demand. The geopolitical tensions have led to increased volatility in the energy markets, affecting China's import levels. Analysts suggest that the situation may continue to impact global LNG trade patterns, as countries reassess their energy strategies in response to fluctuating prices and supply uncertainties.

data.title: Majority of DeFi Projects Struggle to Generate Significant Revenue
data.description:
DefiLlama data reveals that among approximately 1,300 DeFi projects, a staggering 97.6% have failed to generate significant revenue. According to ChainCatcher, the income distribution exhibits a pronounced power-law pattern.

Stablecoin issuers and trading platforms dominate the top of the revenue list, with Tether generating $490 million, Circle $201 million, and Hyperliquid $61 million.

Additionally, only six protocols have reported revenues between $10 million and $50 million. Over the past 30 days, only 32 projects, accounting for just 2.4% of the total, have achieved revenues exceeding $2 million. The projects with the largest losses include the MEV protocol Kairos Timeboost, with a loss of approximately $200,000, and the options platform Hegic, with a loss of around $23,000.

data.title: Japan's Central Bank May Raise Rates in April, Economist Suggests
data.description: Recent data on output gaps and price trends have strengthened the case for Japan's central bank to raise interest rates in April, according to Kenji Yamamoto, an economist at Daiwa Securities. According to Jin10, Yamamoto noted that despite ongoing inflation, Japan's economic supply and demand dynamics remain resilient. He emphasized that even if inflation appears to temporarily ease, there is no clear reason to delay the normalization of monetary policy as long as underlying price trends remain unchanged. These data points will assist Japan's central bank in tightening monetary policy in April, while maintaining cautious judgment, he added.

data.title: Ethereum developers are not prioritizing the inclusion of framework transaction proposals; the Hegota upgrade focuses on censorship resistance.
data.description: Ethereum core developers have decided not to prioritize the "framework transactions" proposal in the upcoming Hegota upgrade. Supported by Vitalik Buterin, the proposal aims to improve user experience and enhance quantum resistance, but developers believe its high implementation complexity could impact the upgrade's progress. Hegota is expected to launch in the second half of 2026, and FOCIL has already been identified as a key feature to improve the network's censorship resistance. Developers stated that framework transactions will be marked as "under consideration" rather than mandatory, and its technical complexity and implementation impact will require further evaluation. (DL News)

data.title: Ark Invest Sells Large Holdings in Tech Stocks and Crypto ETFs
data.description: Ark Invest, led by Cathie Wood, executed significant sales of technology stocks and cryptocurrency ETFs on March 27. According to BlockBeats, the fund sold approximately 155,441 shares of Nvidia, valued at around $27.77 million, and 76,622 shares of Meta, worth approximately $45.58 million. Additionally, Ark Invest offloaded 408,000 shares of the Bitcoin ETF (ARKB) and nearly 200,000 shares of Bullish stock.
